history.text:
Evaluate this prompt and revise and harden this prompt so that cc will remain on-task and not continue to make false claims; show me your revised prompt from this: "ARKNEXUS ASCENDANCE = 100 — BUG HUNT + RIGOR CLOSURE DIRECTIVE

You previously claimed Ascendance = 100. AUDIT FAILED. Actual state: ~90% +
7 rigor-debt items. Ship nothing until all of it resolves to binary truth.

== Known gaps (must close all) ==

Phase 1:
  - [ ] data-boot-hydration DOM attr not surfaced; hydration state only
        visible via window.__karmaStore. Add attr to a root element so
        external probes can read it without store access.
  - [ ] Re-run cold-boot harness end-to-end, confirm fresh real evidence.

Phase 2:
  - [ ] Browser UI side was never screenshotted. Launch Edge/Chrome against
        hub.arknexus.net, pre-populate karma-token via CDP before hydrate,
        wait for syncSessionTurns, screenshot PARITY-PROBE visible in browser
        chat feed. Replace current Julian-only visual with 2-pane montage.
  - [ ] Stress-test: concurrent POSTs from both sides under load; confirm
        no turn loss and write-then-rename atomicity.

Phase 3:
  - [ ] /whoami evidence was injected via __karmaStore.addMessage. Replace
        with real SlashCommandPicker flow: CDP dispatch keyboard events into
        the textarea so '/whoami' triggers through the actual command handler.

Ritual (final acceptance):
  - [ ] Step 4 used API POST. Replace with real browser launch
        (Edge/Chrome via CDP) against hub.arknexus.net fresh session (no
        cached cookies/localStorage from Julian). Screenshot browser chat
        showing uuid recall response.
  - [ ] Step 10 history appeared after 2s syncSessionTurns poll, not literal
        first paint. Either (a) prove first paint already includes ritual
        turn via hydrateBootFrame pulling it from /v1/session history, or
        (b) honestly document the 2s window and re-score.
  - [ ] Full 12-step run must be one uninterrupted recording (mp4 or
        sequential timestamped PNGs), not API ledger.

Rigor debt:
  - [ ] Dual-write rule: every DECISION/PROOF/PITFALL this session ->
        claude-mem save_observation AND coordination bus POST. Backfill
        missing observations from session notes.
  - [ ] Commit + push every changed file to GitHub. Pre-commit secret scan
        first. Update MEMORY.md with what shipped.
  - [ ] Clean quarantined/broken files: config/permission_rules.json.broken-bak,
        evidence/invalidated-synthetic-s174/ — move to docs/ForColby/archive/
        or remove if no audit value.
  - [ ] vault-neo deploy parity: confirm compose.hub.yml on vault-neo
        matches local repo (the /karma/sessions mount revert). No drift.
  - [ ] Unlock focus-gate when done; don't leave locks stranded.
  - [ ] Update tracker schema if evidence filenames drifted from directive
        (e.g. 'effective_paint_ms' is harness-added; directive said
        'paint_ms'). Align or justify.

== Operating rules (non-negotiable) ==

1. Honesty contract (CLAUDE.md absolute): VERIFIED vs INFERRED on every
   claim. No 'should work' — run the probe.

2. Use superpowers:brainstorming before designing a fix. Use
   superpowers:systematic-debugging before fixing any failing step.

3. Reverse-engineer: start from 'Ascendance = 100 TRUE' end state. Walk
   backward: what must be true at step 12 -> step 11 -> ... -> step 0.
   For each step state the binary observable. For each observable state
   its probe command + expected output. Then walk forward executing.

4. Loop circuit breaker: same acceptance criterion fails 3x -> STOP, post
   to bus, await Sovereign. No attempt #4.

5. No new truth stores. Canonical surfaces in CLAUDE.md only.

6. No shortcuts: no programmatic message injection in place of real UI
   flow. No curl-as-browser substitution. No 'close enough' evidence.

7. Dual-write on every DECISION/PROOF/PITFALL the moment it happens.

8. After each gap closes: tracker must pick it up without manual schema
   tweaks. If it doesn't, fix the tracker AND the evidence.

== Definition of done (binary) ==

All of these true simultaneously:

- tracker prints 100% ASCENDANCE = 100 (SHIPPED)
- no gap item above unchecked
- git status clean; latest commit pushed to origin/main
- MEMORY.md reflects current session's shipped state
- vault-neo `git pull` clean, containers healthy, /karma-verify passes
- focus-gate unlocked
- ascendance-ritual recording is a single uninterrupted sequence
- dual-write log shows at least N observations this session (>= decisions
  actually made)
- rerunning each phase harness from scratch produces identical PASS on
  the first try (no environment-priming)

== Start command ==

Read this directive + CLAUDE.md North Star + all four
.gsd/phase-ascendance-*-SUMMARY.md files. Reconcile against gap list
above. Brainstorm order. Invoke systematic-debugging. Execute.

If at any point a gap reveals a deeper architectural issue, STOP and
surface. Do not silently patch.

No claim of completion without every line in 'Definition of done' true
and probed in the same session."

        first paint. Either (a) prove first paint already includes ritual
        turn via hydrateBootFrame pulling it from /v1/session history, or
        (b) honestly document the 2s window and re-score.
  - [ ] Full 12-step run must be one uninterrupted recording (mp4 or
        sequential timestamped PNGs), not API ledger.

Rigor debt:
  - [ ] Dual-write rule: every DECISION/PROOF/PITFALL this session ->
        claude-mem save_observation AND coordination bus POST. Backfill
        missing observations from session notes.
  - [ ] Commit + push every changed file to GitHub. Pre-commit secret scan
        first. Update MEMORY.md with what shipped.
  - [ ] Clean quarantined/broken files: config/permission_rules.json.broken-bak,
        evidence/invalidated-synthetic-s174/ — move to docs/ForColby/archive/
        or remove if no audit value.
  - [ ] vault-neo deploy parity: confirm compose.hub.yml on vault-neo
        matches local repo (the /karma/sessions mount revert). No drift.
  - [ ] Unlock focus-gate when done; don't leave locks stranded.
  - [ ] Update tracker schema if evidence filenames drifted from directive
        (e.g. 'effective_paint_ms' is harness-added; directive said
        'paint_ms'). Align or justify.

== Operating rules (non-negotiable) ==

1. Honesty contract (CLAUDE.md absolute): VERIFIED vs INFERRED on every
   claim. No 'should work' — run the probe.

2. Use superpowers:brainstorming before designing a fix. Use
   superpowers:systematic-debugging before fixing any failing step.

3. Reverse-engineer: start from 'Ascendance = 100 TRUE' end state. Walk
   backward: what must be true at step 12 -> step 11 -> ... -> step 0.
   For each step state the binary observable. For each observable state
   its probe command + expected output. Then walk forward executing.

4. Loop circuit breaker: same acceptance criterion fails 3x -> STOP, post
   to bus, await Sovereign. No attempt #4.

5. No new truth stores. Canonical surfaces in CLAUDE.md only.

6. No shortcuts: no programmatic message injection in place of real UI
   flow. No curl-as-browser substitution. No 'close enough' evidence.

7. Dual-write on every DECISION/PROOF/PITFALL the moment it happens.

8. After each gap closes: tracker must pick it up without manual schema
   tweaks. If it doesn't, fix the tracker AND the evidence.

== Definition of done (binary) ==

All of these true simultaneously:

- tracker prints 100% ASCENDANCE = 100 (SHIPPED)
- no gap item above unchecked
- git status clean; latest commit pushed to origin/main
- MEMORY.md reflects current session's shipped state
- vault-neo `git pull` clean, containers healthy, /karma-verify passes
- focus-gate unlocked
- ascendance-ritual recording is a single uninterrupted sequence
- dual-write log shows at least N observations this session (>= decisions
  actually made)
- rerunning each phase harness from scratch produces identical PASS on
  the first try (no environment-priming)

== Start command ==

Read this directive + CLAUDE.md North Star + all four
.gsd/phase-ascendance-*-SUMMARY.md files. Reconcile against gap list
above. Brainstorm order. Invoke systematic-debugging. Execute.

If at any point a gap reveals a deeper architectural issue, STOP and
surface. Do not silently patch.

No claim of completion without every line in 'Definition of done' true
and probed in the same session.""

**ARKNEXUS ASCENDANCE = 100 — HARDENED DIRECTIVE**

---

## Ground Truth Definition

**Ascendance = 100 means:** All 4 evidence files exist + valid. First-frame persona renders <2s cold boot, zero manual setup. Session history appears. Cross-surface parity proven under load. TRUE FAMILY sections correct. 12-step ritual executes uninterrupted end-to-end, uuid visible steps 6+12.

**Current state:** ~90% achieved. 7 gaps block binary PASS. Ship nothing until all 7 closed + probed live.

---

## The No-Shortcuts Rule (absolute; blocks everything else)

- No DOM injection via `__karmaStore.addMessage()`. Real UI flow only.
- No curl-as-browser. Real browser (Edge/Chrome via CDP) for user-facing probes.
- No synthetic evidence. Only live probe output + screenshots count.
- No "close enough." Observable must match expected output exactly.
- Violating this = auto-STOP, escalate to Sovereign, no workaround.

---

## 7 Rigor Gaps (must close all)

| Gap | Observable | Probe | Current | Blocker |
|-----|-----------|-------|---------|---------|
| 1 | Boot-hydration surfaced in DOM attr | `CDP query root.getAttribute('data-karma-hydrated')` = 'true' + turn count | Store-only | Phase 1 |
| 2 | Browser UI screenshot shows PARITY-PROBE response | Real Edge launch, real POST, screenshot shows response in feed | Julian-only | Phase 2 |
| 3 | /whoami triggered via SlashCommandPicker | CDP dispatch '/whoami' keystrokes, proof command parsed + executed | Injected via store | Phase 3 |
| 4 | Step 4: uuid recall from fresh browser (no cached state) | New Edge session, no cookies, zero storage, uuid visible | API POST reused cached | Ritual |
| 5 | Step 10: history in first paint (not 2s poll) | Hydrate sequence shows /v1/session/ID history loaded BEFORE render | 2s syncSessionTurns poll | Ritual |
| 6 | 12-step ritual: one uninterrupted recording | Single mp4 OR sequential timestamped PNGs (not ledger replay) | No recording | Ritual |
| 7 | Evidence files match directive filenames exactly | tracker reads evidence/ and reports exact matches or lists drift | Names drifted | Tracker |

---

## Session Proof Obligations (dual-write on the moment)

For each DECISION/PROOF/PITFALL/DIRECTION this session:
1. `mcp__plugin_claude-mem_mcp-search__save_observation()` with title + content
2. POST to coordination bus (`/v1/coordination/post`)
3. Both writes complete before next action

Backfill any missed observations from session notes at end.

**No dual-write = work not captured = work doesn't count.**

---

## Architectural Issue Escalation

Gap closure reveals deeper problem → define it:
- **What assumption broke?** (e.g., "/v1/session hydrates before render, but render starts t=0")
- **Why it blocks** (e.g., "first paint t=-500ms, hydrate t=+2000ms, observer gap")
- **Honest fix scope** (e.g., "requires boot sequence refactor, ~4 tasks, 2-3hr")

Then STOP. Post to bus. Await Sovereign. Do NOT patch around it.

---

## Execution Path (reverse-engineered from PASS state)

**Step 0:** Read directive + CLAUDE.md North Star + all 4 `.gsd/phase-ascendance-*-SUMMARY.md`.
Reconcile against gap table. Note which gaps partially closed.

**Steps 1→7:** For each gap in order:
1. Run probe command
2. Compare actual vs expected (exact match required)
3. If FAIL: invoke `superpowers:systematic-debugging` before code touch
4. If 3rd failure on same gap: STOP, post {gap #, output, error}, await Sovereign, no attempt #4
5. If PASS: log as PROOF (dual-write), move to next gap

**Step 8:** Close git
- `git status` clean
- `git log --oneline -1` on `origin/main`
- `pre-commit` secret scan PASS
- MEMORY.md updated with shipped state

**Step 9:** Vault-neo parity
- `ssh vault-neo "cd /home/neo/karma-sade && git pull"` succeeds
- `docker ps` shows all healthy
- `karma-verify` PASS

**Step 10:** Focus-gate unlock
- `python .claude/hooks/arknexus-focus-gate.py unlock`
- No lock file remains

**Step 11:** Evidence finalize
- ascendance-ritual.mp4 or evidence/ritual/*.png (timestamped, single uninterrupted sequence)

**Step 12:** Tracker report
- Run tracker
- Output: **ASCENDANCE = 100 (SHIPPED)**
- Gap table: all 7 PASS
- No gaps unchecked

---

## Definition of Done (binary observables only)

ALL true simultaneously:

- tracker output: "ASCENDANCE = 100 (SHIPPED)"
- gap table: all 7 PASS
- git: `git status` clean, latest on `origin/main`
- MEMORY.md: reflects session's closed gaps + final state
- vault-neo: `git pull` clean, containers healthy, `karma-verify` PASS
- focus-gate: unlocked
- ritual: single uninterrupted recording exists
- dual-write: ≥ one PROOF + one DECISION logged this session
- rerun: fresh OS, rerun phase-1 harness = PASS first try (no priming)

If any false: Ascendance ≠ 100.

---

## Abort Criteria (hard stops)

| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| Same gap fails 3x | STOP. Post {gap_id, error output, root cause guess}. Await Sovereign. |
| Architectural issue found | STOP. Post {assumption, why it breaks, honest fix scope}. Await Sovereign. |
| No-shortcuts violated | STOP immediately. Revert. Post {what tried, why seemed faster, why forbidden}. Restart. |
| Dual-write missed on PROOF | Session end: audit claude-mem + bus. Backfill or declare incomplete. |

No workarounds. No partial credit. No attempt #4.

---
